Your clinic deserves
a smarter way.

We asked doctors across India about their biggest daily frustrations.
Here's what they told us — and how MedQ+ solves every single one.

7 real questions from doctors
Real solutions, not promises
Click each slide to reveal the answer
Question 01 of 07
About your time
"How many appointment calls did your staff handle today?"
Most clinics receive 40–80 calls per day just for bookings.
The MedQ+ Answer
Zero appointment calls.
Ever again.

Patients book their own appointments online — 24/7, from their phone, in their language. Your staff never needs to answer a booking call.

0
Booking calls needed
24/7
Booking availability
3
Languages supported

Patients pick their own slot

They choose from your available times — no back-and-forth, no holds, no missed calls.

Cancellations & rescheduling — automatic

Patients manage their own bookings. Your calendar stays clean without any staff effort.

Works in Hindi, Kannada & English

Patients book in their own language. No language barrier, no miscommunication.

Question 02 of 07
About your patients
"Are patients crowded in your waiting room right now?"
The average patient waits 2–3 hours in a clinic in India without knowing their turn.
The MedQ+ Answer
Patients wait at home.
Arrive just in time.

The live queue tracker shows every patient their exact token number and estimated wait. They leave home at the right moment and walk in right before their turn.

#09
Now serving live
~18m
Your wait estimate

Real-time queue position on their phone

Patients see "You are #12, now serving #9" — they decide when to leave home.

Your waiting room stays calm

No crowded corridors. No frustrated patients asking "how long?". A peaceful clinic every day.

Happy patients leave better reviews

A smooth experience means patients return and recommend you to others.

Question 03 of 07
About your reach
"How many patients near you couldn't find your clinic today?"
Patients search online for doctors. If you're not there, they find someone else.
The MedQ+ Answer
Nearby patients find you.
Automatically.

Your verified profile is discoverable to every patient searching by disease, symptom, or GPS location within 50 km. You don't advertise — patients come to you.

50km
Discovery radius
10+
Symptoms mapped
✦
Verified badge

Symptom search maps to your specialty

"Chest pain" → Cardiologist. "Fever" → General Physician. Patients find exactly who they need.

GPS puts you first for nearby patients

The closer a patient is to your clinic, the higher you appear in their search results.

Admin-verified badge builds trust

Your profile is reviewed and verified — patients choose verified doctors over unknown listings.

Question 04 of 07
About your team
"What happens to your clinic when your receptionist is absent?"
Reliable staff are harder to find every year — and one absence can bring the whole clinic to a halt.
The MedQ+ Answer
The clinic runs itself.
With or without staff.

MedQ+ automates everything a receptionist does — bookings, check-ins, walk-in registration, queue management. Your clinic never depends on a single person — or on finding reliable staff that gets harder to hire every year.

1
Patient books online
2
Gets slot & token
3
Tracks live queue
4
Arrives on time

Walk-in registration from any device

Any staff member can register a walk-in patient in 30 seconds — no training needed.

Invite multiple receptionists

Add backup staff easily — each gets their own login and access to check-in and booking tools.

Queue auto-advances every 3 minutes

Even if nobody is at the front desk, the queue keeps moving — patients stay informed.

Question 05 of 07
About your online presence
"How much do you spend each year on a website and server for your clinic?"
A custom clinic website plus hosting can cost ₹15,000–₹40,000 a year — and still needs constant upkeep.
The MedQ+ Answer
Your clinic is already online.
No website needed.

MedQ+ gives every doctor a complete digital presence — profile, bookings, reviews and a live queue. There is no separate website to build, no server to rent, and nothing to maintain.

₹0
Website cost
0
Servers to manage
10 min
To go live

Your profile is your website

Patients see your specialities, timings, location and reviews — all on one verified, professional page.

Zero servers, zero maintenance

No hosting bills, no downtime, no IT person to call. MedQ+ runs the whole thing for you.

Always up to date

Change your timings or fees once — patients instantly see the latest. No web developer needed.

Question 06 of 07
About your days off
"What happens to your bookings on the days you decide to take off?"
One unplanned holiday can mean a dozen confused patients arriving at a closed clinic.
The MedQ+ Answer
Block unavailable days in advance.
Zero booking confusion.

Mark your holidays, conferences and personal days ahead of time. MedQ+ instantly closes those slots — no patient can book them, and no one shows up to a locked door.

1
Mark day unavailable
2
Slots close instantly
3
Patients see it live
4
No wrong bookings

Set unavailable days ahead of time

Block a single day or a whole week in a tap. Your calendar updates the moment you do.

Patients can never book closed days

Those dates simply disappear from the booking screen — no confusion, no double-booking.

Plan your time with confidence

Take that holiday or attend that conference without a single worry about your clinic.

Question 07 of 07
About your focus
"How many hours a day go to managing appointments instead of treating patients?"
Every minute spent on scheduling and phone calls is a minute taken away from patient care.
The MedQ+ Answer
Spend your time healing.
Not scheduling.

Your years of training were for medicine — not for managing a calendar. MedQ+ takes appointment management off your plate so your focus stays where it matters most: your patients.

2–3 hrs
Saved every day
0
Booking calls
100%
On patient care

Appointments run on autopilot

Booking, check-ins and the live queue all happen on their own — without you lifting a finger.

Your attention stays on patients

Walk into every consultation prepared, unhurried and fully present.

Your time is valuable — protect it

Less admin, less stress, and more of the work that made you become a doctor.
